children.value: Preferred styles: Chibi, Pixel Art. I mainly create original works, and occasionally fan-art. Commercial commissions for artworks are unavailable at this time.
You can download and use these stickers on platforms where they are already available. The display quality of stickers varies depending on platform requirements; please refer to the actual version.
